testcase.name: shouldReturnNotFoundForUnknownSymbol
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Status expected:<404> but was:<503> at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.fail(AssertionErrors.java:59) at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.assertEquals(AssertionErrors.java:122) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.StatusResultMatchers.lambda$matcher$9(StatusResultMatchers.java:637) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc$1.andExpect(MockMvc.java:214) at com.tpi.marketdata.CotizacionControllerTest.shouldReturnNotFoundForUnknownSymbol(CotizacionControllerTest.java:32) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

2026-06-27T20:55:50.508-03:00 INFO 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] c.t.marketdata.CotizacionControllerTest : Started CotizacionControllerTest in 1.762 seconds (process running for 2.798) 2026-06-27T20:55:50.510-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state LivenessState changed to CORRECT 2026-06-27T20:55:50.512-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state ReadinessState changed to ACCEPTING_TRAFFIC 2026-06-27T20:55:51.625-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.tpi.marketdata.controller.CotizacionController#getCotizacion(String) 2026-06-27T20:55:51.891-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : HTTP GET https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/UNKNOWN 2026-06-27T20:55:51.918-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Accept=[application/json, application/*+json] 2026-06-27T20:55:52.594-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Response 404 NOT_FOUND 2026-06-27T20:55:52.607-03:00 ERROR 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] c.t.m.service.CotizacionMercadoService : Error al obtener cotización de Yahoo Finance para UNKNOWN: 404 Not Found: "{"chart":{"result":null,"error":{"code":"Not Found","description":"No data found, symbol may be delisted"}}}" 2026-06-27T20:55:52.614-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Using @ExceptionHandler com.tpi.marketdata.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler#handleResponseStatusException(ResponseStatusException) 2026-06-27T20:55:52.614-03:00 WARN 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] c.t.m.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : MarketData - ResponseStatusException: 503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE - No se pudo obtener la cotización para UNKNOWN 2026-06-27T20:55:52.654-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [*/*] and supported [application/json, application/*+json] 2026-06-27T20:55:52.661-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] o.s.w.s.m.m.a.HttpEntityMethodProcessor : Writing [ErrorResponse[codigo=503, mensaje=No se pudo obtener la cotización para UNKNOWN, marcaTiempo=2026-06 (truncated)...] 2026-06-27T20:55:52.677-03:00 DEBUG 25676 --- [tpi-market-data-service] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.server.ResponseStatusException: 503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE "No se pudo obtener la cotización para UNKNOWN"]

testcase.name: shouldReturnQuoteForKnownSymbol
